title: odontites kaliformis
side_effects: Odontites kaliformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting. In severe cases, improper use of odontites kaliformis can also cause respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma attacks. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potentially hazardous side effects.
